title: WebSite
description: A complete IIS web site resource including configuration, bindings, application pool assignment, and HAL links to related resources.

name.description: The name of the web site.

id.description: The unique identifier of the web site.

physical_path.description: The physical file system path for the web site root.

status.description: The current status of the web site.

server_auto_start.description: Whether the web site starts automatically when IIS starts.

enabled_protocols.description: The protocols enabled for this web site, as a comma-separated list.

bindings.description: The list of bindings configured for this web site.
